channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Burna Boy suggests possible appearance on Drake’s upcoming ‘Ice Man’ album
item.description: Burna Boy don drop subtle hint say him and Canadian superstar Drake fit get new music together, although nothing don dey fully confirmed yet. For one recent interview with Speedy Mormon on Complex, th...

item.title: Duterte camp to challenge ICC pre-trial ruling confirming charges
item.description: Ayon sa ulat, plano ng lead defense counsel na si Nicholas Kaufman na iapela ang naging desisyon ng International Criminal Court (ICC) Pre-Trial Chamber na kumpirmahin ang mga kasong isinampa laban ka...

item.title: Peter Hook Rejects New Order Reunion Amid Ongoing Legal and Personal Feud
item.description: Peter Hook, the former bassist of Joy Division and New Order, has made it clear that he has no interest in reuniting with his former bandmates, even for their upcoming Rock & Roll Hall of Fame inducti...

item.title: Live Updates on Phase 1 Voting in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu Elections 2026
item.description: The first phase of the 2026 elections in West Bengal has commenced, with voters across various constituencies casting their votes. The ruling Trinamool Congress (TMC), led by Mamata Banerjee, is aimin...

item.title: Foreign Office Closes Unit Monitoring Israel’s Compliance with International Law Due to Budget Cuts
item.description: A key unit within the UK Foreign Office dedicated to monitoring potential breaches of international law by Israel has been closed due to departmental budget cuts. This closure, which also affects the ...

item.title: Ontario government puts Pelee Island ferry Jiimaan up for sale
item.description: The Ontario government has listed the former Pelee Island ferry Jiimaan for sale. This ferry, once a vital link between Pelee Island and the mainland, is now being sold as part of the province's ongoi...

item.title: Delhi court directs FIR against Abhijit Iyer-Mitra over alleged sexually abusive posts targeting women journalists
item.description: A Delhi court has directed the registration of a First Information Report (FIR) against commentator Abhijit Iyer-Mitra over allegedly objectionable and sexually abusive social media posts targeting wo...

item.title: Truck operator heard warning before LaGuardia crash but did not recognize the caller
item.description: A truck driver involved in a fatal incident at LaGuardia Airport reported hearing a warning to 'stop, stop, stop' prior to the crash but was unsure who it was directed at. The incident, which resulted...

item.title: Blakeman Faces Scrutiny Over Appearance With Controversial GOP Figure
item.description: Nassau County Executive and Republican gubernatorial candidate Bruce Blakeman, previously known for welcoming Muslim residents and participating in community events, is now drawing criticism for his u...

item.title: A Look at the Preserved Hobbiton Film Set and Tours in New Zealand
item.description: The article highlights the enduring appeal of the Hobbiton film set in Matamata, New Zealand, originally created for The Lord of the Rings trilogy. More than two decades after the films were released,...

item.title: Indian Navy highlights strategic importance of Strait of Hormuz and other maritime choke points
item.description: In light of the ongoing blockade at the Strait of Hormuz and the resulting increase in global crude oil prices, the Indian Navy has formally released its maritime security strategy. Navy Chief Admiral...

item.title: MCD starts seven‑day drive to map residential homes turned into shops and offices across Delhi
item.description: The Municipal Corporation of Delhi (MCD) has begun a time‑bound mapping exercise to identify homes in the capital that are being used as shops, offices and other commercial establishments. This drive ...

item.title: Goodluck Jonathan Legacy Project Fires Back at Atiku Abubakar for Calling Jonathan Inexperienced
item.description: The National Coordinator of the Goodluck Jonathan Legacy Project (GJLP), Engr Juan Amechee, has sharply criticised former Vice President Alhaji Atiku Abubakar for describing governance challenges duri...

item.title: LRT-1 operator to resume construction of delayed common station project
item.description: The Light Rail Manila Corporation (LRMC), the operator of LRT-1, is now taking over the construction of the long-delayed common station project, which is expected to improve the commuting experience f...

item.title: Psychiatrist’s warning missed before Nottingham triple killings
item.description: A psychiatrist’s warning that Valdo Calocane, a man diagnosed with paranoid schizophrenia, would end up killing someone went unheeded, an inquiry has heard. Calocane went on to kill three people in No...

item.title: Israel and Lebanon Agree to Three‑Week Extension of Cease‑Fire Amid Iran‑Led Conflict
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend a temporary cease‑fire by three weeks, following high‑level talks at the White House between ambassadors from both c...

item.title: Ontario proposes legislation to assume control of Toronto Island airport if needed
item.description: The Ontario government has introduced legislation that would give the province the authority to take control of Toronto’s Billy Bishop Airport, commonly known as the Toronto Island airport. The bill i...

item.title: Ben Roberts-Smith planned overseas business venture before arrest
item.description: Court documents released in April 2026 show that Ben Roberts-Smith, the former Australian soldier accused of war crimes in Afghanistan, had been investigating overseas business opportunities before hi...

item.title: ACCC challenges Woolworths over misleading discounts amid inflation changes
item.description: Australia’s competition watchdog, the ACCC, has taken Woolworths and Coles to the Federal Court over allegations of misleading discount practices. The case centres on Woolworths’ 'Prices Dropped' camp...

item.title: Trump pledges rapid renovation of Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool using private contractor
item.description: During a press briefing in the Oval Office, President Donald Trump shifted focus from ongoing US pharmaceutical and industrial policy to announce a major renovation of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting ...
